title: nymphaea stuhlmannii
intro: Nymphaea stuhlmannii, also known as the Stuhlmann's water lily, is a species of aquatic plant in the family Nymphaeaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nymphaea stuhlmannii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and antipyretic properties. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
